title: Workdocs monday - Only 12 printed pages
excerpt:

posts.author: CedricB (B)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’ve created a monday document (release notes) and want to export it as a PDF to save it.

1/ When I use the integrated export function, all 13 pages of my document are exported, but when I open it with Adobe Acrobat, an error window appears “This page contains an error”, so it’s not a good idea to share a document that displays an error for no reason.

2/ When I use the “Print to pdf” feature, I’m missing pages, I can’t get the full document even though there are emojis in the document and there’s no error.

Thanks for your help!

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml: Why would anyone pay for an app to fix a monday.com bug?
